section.heading: Prohibition on land acquisition

content.p: No funds under this chapter shall be used for land acquisition.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 814, formerly § 821, as added Pub. L. 96–157, § 2, Dec. 27, 1979, 93 Stat. 1214; renumbered § 814, Pub. L. 98–473, title II, § 609B(f), Oct. 12, 1984, 98 Stat. 2093.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 3789j of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 814 of Pub. L. 90–351 was classified to section 3789c of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to repeal by section 609B(e) of Pub. L. 98–473.
